data.body:
[Mini Event Notice]

Balancing Schale's Books with the General Student Council is happening for the next 2 weeks!
Join now to earn Activity Reports and materials![EmJNgFCVS3HsSU73qJo0bPnqARkI67YI.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/EmJNgFCVS3HsSU73qJo0bPnqARkI67YI.jpg) to improve your students' skills!

🗓️Schedule: 12/12 (Tue) 2:00 AM – 12/26 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)

#BlueArchive
